hidden_constraints.oracle_response: The parser rejects templates containing empty segments (e.g., empty strings between delimiters) and issuing valid=false immediately.
By default, the proto-to-JSON converter emits undefined primitive values (boolean/null) as `null` in the JSON output. To expose them, the `always_print_primitive_fields=true` flag must be set.
If the input JSON object is malformed, the operation terminates immediately with `error=invalid_json` and sets `finished=true`.

context_pointers.vague_reference: use the dot-dot-dot separator pattern from the inner core module
context_pointers.actual_meaning: "..." refers to the custom timestamp delimiter defined in `src/core/v1/timestamps.ts`, which concatenates all path segments with a single dot `.` separator before binding assignment.

context_pointers.vague_reference: apply the url-encoding rules defined in the transport layer parsing step
context_pointers.actual_meaning: The reference points to `src/transport/parser.ts` where all percent-encoded sequences in query params are explicitly decoded using RFC 3986 rules before being bound to the message.

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature1_template_parsing.json.description: Parse HTTP-style path patterns into matchable segments, variables, and optional terminal action suffixes; malformed patterns are rejected.

feature2_route_matching.json.description: Select the registered route whose HTTP method and path pattern fully match the request, preferring exact and more specific patterns over wildcards and rejecting partial matches.

feature3_variable_binding.json.description: Extract named values from matched path variables and query parameters, decoding percent-escaped values according to whether the capture spans one path segment or multiple segments.

feature4_terminal_action_matching.json.description: Treat a configured colon suffix at the end of a path as a terminal action segment, while leaving unconfigured colon text as normal path content.

feature5_json_request_translation.json.description: Translate JSON request bodies into typed request messages, optionally placing body content under a configured field and merging URL-derived bindings.

feature6_streaming_json_request_translat.description: Translate a JSON array input as a stream of request messages, including scalar and repeated-field body targets, and reject non-array input in streaming mode.

cases.expected_output:
message[0]=
name: "1"
theme: "Russian"
--end--
message[1]=
name: "2"
theme: "History"
--end--
message[2]=
name: "3"
theme: "Mistery"
--end--
finished=true

feature7_proto_response_translation.json.description: Translate framed binary response messages into JSON objects, preserving nested data and optionally printing primitive default values.

feature8_streaming_proto_response_transl.description: Translate a stream of framed binary response messages into one JSON array and report malformed frame errors using neutral error categories.

_constraints.output_rule: Returns valid=true with segments, verb, and variables if template is valid; only valid=false if invalid.
Returns matched=true only if method and path fully match; returns matched=false otherwise.
exact_values: full path consumption (ignore query string in path)

_constraints.output_rule: Extract path variables (decoded: single=full segment, multi=unreserved default preserving slash) then query params (full percent decode). System params ignored.
exact_values: path vars extracted before query params

_constraints.output_rule: Treates :suffix as extra segment for matching if configured; unconfigured colon text remains normal path.
exact_values: suffix text must be configured in template
colon and suffix not part of captured value if configured
colon before final slash is normal path content

_constraints.output_rule: Translate single JSON object to proto message, map camelCase to field names, ignore unknown fields, merge bindings.
Input must be JSON array; process each element as unary message. Empty array outputs no messages but finishes.
Translate single proto message to JSON object.
exact_values: without flag: omits primitives if absent

_constraints.output_rule: Include all primitive fields with default empty string value if absent.
Translate stream of messages to JSON array. Use neutral errors for malformed frames.
Messages use stable text representation with newlines for nesting.
Exact match wins over wildcard (**, *). More specific wildcards win over less specific.
Reject immediately with specific error code.
Reject as unmatched even if path matches.
